name: Worktrees View
description: VS Code WebviewView sidebar panel that lists all git worktrees for the current repo with status badges, session counts, and per-worktree color coding. Hosts the worktree commands (create, remove, switch, set color, open in new window).
guidelines: Refresh on window focus and on document save so dirty/ahead-behind badges stay current without polling.
Worktree removal of the active worktree must persist intent via PENDING_REMOVAL_KEY and switch the workspace folder first — see extension-core deferred removal pattern.
anti_patterns: Do not poll git status on a timer — only refresh on user-visible events (focus, save, command).
decisions: Uses retainContextWhenHidden so the webview state survives panel collapse without a full re-render.
